chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 03 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No.62/2016. 30.01.2026 Matter is pending since 2016 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Diary demonstrates that on each successive date applicant has remained unrepresented or adjournment has been sought on applicant’s behalf. Even today applicant is unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
